3287830.name: Robinson Crusoe Demo
3287830.description:
Embark on an epic journey as Robinson Crusoe, a lone castaway stranded on a tropical island in the heart of the 17th-century Caribbean. Inspired by the timeless classic by Daniel Defoe, this action-adventure survival game challenges you to not only endure but conquer the wilds. Explore a dynamic world where every jump and climb uncovers ancient secrets and keeps you ahead of the lurking threat of hostile native tribes. Master the art of survival by crafting essential tools, building shelters, and honing your combat skills to defend against the relentless dangers of the island, be it man or beast. Every decision you make will shape your story in this unforgiving wilderness - will you overcome the odds and unravel the island’s dark mysteries, or will the island claim you as its own?



In the demo, you’ll find three distinct missions that showcase most of the game’s features.

The first mission takes you to coastal caves, where you’ll embark on an exciting adventure. You’ll explore the movement mechanics, climbing narrow ledges and jumping over chasms. You’ll face a mix of combat against native guards and stealth sections as you sneak through the cave passages.

The second mission demonstrates how you can conquer enemy bases. You’ll deal with kidnappers, free captives, and face an intense boss fight at the end.

The third mission lets you experience the survival aspect of the game. You’ll gather resources, build your own shelter, and master the basics of survival on this tropical island.
3287830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
